description_for_human: Agent-native version control hub API for custom GPT actions. Codex should use the local vcs MCP server instead.
description_for_model: vcs-spike exposes structured change tracking for multi-agent coding workflows over HTTP. This manifest is for custom GPT actions against a running vcs serve hub. Codex should use packages/vcs-mcp and skill/SKILL.md for local filesystem-aware tools. The hub server connects structured stores, including stacks, changes, edit metadata, file-state rows, and blobs, so cross-project conflicts surface before deployment.
